description_long: This object represents a young child with stylized proportions, featuring a large head and slender limbs. The child has long hair styled into two thick pigtails, each adorned with small spherical accessories. The clothing appears to be a simple, fitted outfit with short sleeves and a skirt or dress, and the arms and legs are thin and elongated. The facial features are minimal but include a visible eye and a small nose, with the head slightly tilted. The overall form is somewhat abstract, with exaggerated limb lengths and angular shapes, giving it a cartoon-like appearance. There are no visible accessories such as bags or hats, and the footwear is not clearly defined.
description: A stylized child with long pigtails, a simple dress, and exaggerated, angular limbs. The figure has a cartoon-like, abstract appearance with minimal facial features.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the large head, pigtails, and the angular spread of the limbs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated limbs, pigtails, and the profile of the head and body.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the head, pigtails, and the spread of the arms and legs.
description_view_3: Angled view from behind, showing the pigtails, back, and the angular extension of the limbs.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeve dress with fitted bodice and flared skirt
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair styled in thick pigtails with spherical accessories
